slides.subtitle: Website Development
slides.titleHtml:
Professional websites for growing businesses
focused on trust and real inquiries

seo.title: Professional Website Development | Business-focused websites
seo.description: We build clear, high-trust websites for growing businesses that need better visibility and more qualified inquiries.

about.subtitle: What we do for your business
about.title: Websites built to support real commercial goals

whatWeDo.subtitle: What outcomes we prioritize
whatWeDo.title: Be understood, trusted and contacted
whatWeDo.text: We design and build professional websites for businesses that need stronger positioning, better trust and more qualified inquiries.
bullets: Clear value proposition from the first section
Structure prepared for relevant search intent
Conversion-oriented sections and calls to action
Fast pages to reduce bounce and improve engagement
Scalable base to grow without rebuilding everything
Inquiry tracking for better decision making
ads: Landing pages focused on qualified inquiries
Tracking setup for forms, WhatsApp and calls
Message and CTA testing to improve conversion

existingWebsite.subtitle: Already have a website?
existingWebsite.title: Audit, update and improvement plan
existingWebsite.description: If your current site is not generating inquiries, we define practical improvements in clear stages.

pricingSection.subtitle: Website Packages
pricingSection.title: Options based on your business stage
pricingSection.description: From first launch to scalable digital presence with a clear commercial focus.

plans.name: Package 1 · Basic Site
plans.description: Professional one‑page to present services, brand and contact. Ideal to get presence on Google quickly.
features: Single‑page site: services, contact and about

plans.name: Package 2 · Site + Google Ads
plans.description: Conversion‑optimized website with initial search campaigns setup to capture qualified leads.
features: Tag setup: Google Tag, GA4 and Conversions

plans.name: Package 3 · Site + Ads + Social
plans.description: End‑to‑end solution: complete website, Google Ads campaigns and ongoing social media management.
features: Responsive, technical SEO and speed optimized

pricingSection.note: *Domain and SSL subject to availability. Plans may vary based on scope, language, integrations and campaign volume.

items.q: How long does a website project take?
items.a: A focused website usually takes 2–4 weeks. Broader projects can take 6–10 weeks depending on scope.

items.q: Will the website be ready to appear in Google?
items.a: Yes. We include a clear structure, metadata and content foundation so Google can understand your business.

items.q: Do you provide support after launch?
items.a: Yes. We can support continuous improvements, updates and security based on your goals.

items.q: Can you work with our current website?
items.a: Yes. We assess your current site and recommend whether to improve it or build a new base.

workWithUs.subtitle: Work with us
workWithUs.title: Ready to turn your website into a business channel?
